description: Returns passenger-car body style counts by decade. Use for hatchback/sedan crossovers, cabriolet history, MPV peaks, or body-style trends. Caveats: no dedicated SUV category; pre-1980 surviving cars overrepresent preserved classics.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1950 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2026 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | EVAL decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1960, "1950s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1970, "1960s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "1970s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY decade, body_style = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KarrosseriTypeStruktur.KarrosseriTypeNavn.keyword | SORT decade ASC, car_count DESC | LIMIT 80
